summary: FINAL PRE-LAUNCH REVIEW (Iteration 6) - All tests passed. Bare Force One LLC website is ready for launch. Comprehensive testing completed covering all navigation routes, forms, API endpoints, mobile responsiveness, and 404 page handling.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section, navbar, footer
All 8 navigation links present and routing correctly
Insights page (/insights) renders with 4 blog article cards
Request Proposal page (/request-proposal) renders with form
Contact form submission works end-to-end with success message
Request Proposal form submission works end-to-end with success message
Footer renders with all navigation links
Footer has tel: link for phone number (954-296-9953)
Mobile responsiveness - forms visible and usable
SEO meta tags present via react-helmet-async
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: src/pages/NotFound.js has unused 'Link' import (eslint warning)
seed_data_creation: Test submissions created with TEST_ prefix for contact and proposal forms
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. No regressions found. Site is ready for production launch. The only warning is an unused import in NotFound.js which does not affect functionality.
console_errors_analysis: Only Google Analytics (GA4) and Cloudflare RUM requests failed - these are expected in headless browser testing environment and work correctly in real browsers. No application JavaScript errors found.
note_on_blog_articles: Blog articles are hardcoded in frontend as expected per design spec - this is intentional, not a bug.
